text.title: Solo Support SLA Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by observable signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — handle ad-hoc; SLA is theatre below 5/week
skip-this-methodology — use real helpdesk SLA + rotation
draft 3-tier SLA + business-hours boundary + 4 canned replies

text.example: volume_lt_5=false (≥5/week) → team_size_gt_1=false (solo) → conclusion business-hours-boundary → 3-tier SLA emitted.
